name: Codebase Symbol Indexing
description: Extracts symbols (classes, methods, properties, enums) from source files and maintains a codebase-wide symbol index mapping symbol names to features. Supports multi-language extraction, incremental updates, and filters out non-code asset files (.png, .meta) to improve indexing performance on large projects.
